{{CargoRelic
|name=Hoxne Hoard
|class_id=22181
|rank=AAA
|affct=CIV
|birthday=11-15
|source=Lottery Machine No.2 (0.06%), Wishing (0.02%)
|description=On Nov 15, 1992 AD, a Hox resident failed to find a hammer, with a metal detector, he discovered a hoard of coins.<br>The Hoxne Hoard is named after the town of Hox. It refers to a collection of coins inadvertently discovered by a resident when he was searching for a hammer. Afterward, archaeologists dug out over ten thousand silver coins and five hundred gold coins. Some of the gold coins were over 99% gold. According to experts, these coins originated in the third century. The coins' minting, distribution, and burial spanned a period of fewer than 50 years, therefore the coins have been well preserved. Ultimately, the British government bought the entire Hoard at the price of 1.5 million pounds.
|fame=49
|art=46
|fth=41
|civ=72
|tech=35
|ss1=Per 30 Dragon Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +120<br>Per 30 Dragon Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +12
|ss2=Per 30 Dragon Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +160<br>Per 30 Dragon Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +16
|ss3=Per 30 Dragon Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +200<br>Per 30 Dragon Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +20
|ss4=Per 30 Dragon Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +280<br>Per 30 Dragon Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +28
|ss5=Per 30 Dragon Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +360<br>Per 30 Dragon Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +36
|ss7=Per 30 Dragon Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +360<br>Per 30 Dragon Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +36<br>Per 30 Dragon Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +280 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Compass skill II.png|50px]]Place in Exploration Compass: In explorations, 2x B-tad Drops +7.5%
|skill2=[[File:Compass skill II.png|50px]]Place in Exploration Compass: In explorations, 2x Purple Reagent Drops +7.5%
}}
